originalAlarm.description: Memory dynamically allocated by `malloc` on line 26 is not freed after the last access at line 26, column 3.

reasoning: Known bug for eef2317b9f5.c is uninitialized branch (PRODUCT_22: TRUE). This alarm detects a memory leak: buf = malloc(bufsize) at L26 is allocated but when CLEAN_UP=F, the free(buf) at L31 is not compiled, so buf is leaked. New bug. PC (CLEAN_UP=F) exactly captures when the leak occurs — allocation happens in the path that skips the cleanup block. Correctly constrained.
